text.title: Spring Boot Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for applying Boot patterns to a new module.

step.name: inventory-config
step.action: Find every @Value + System.getenv; group by concern (mail/auth/feature-flag). Determine env-specific overrides.

step.name: create-properties-records
step.action: For each concern, create `@ConfigurationProperties(prefix="app.<concern>") @Validated` record/class with Jakarta validation annotations. Register via `@EnableConfigurationProperties`.

step.name: wire-controller-advice
step.action: Create `@RestControllerAdvice` extending ResponseEntityExceptionHandler. Override handleMethodArgumentNotValid + add @ExceptionHandler per business exception, returning ProblemDetail.

step.name: profile-bean-wiring
step.action: Replace runtime if (env) checks with @Profile-annotated beans OR @ConditionalOnProperty for feature flags.
step.decision-gate: If runtime env check remains, STOP and refactor.

step.name: validate-startup
step.action: Run `./mvnw spring-boot:run --spring.profiles.active=prod` against each profile YAML. Confirm ConstraintViolationException on bad values; confirm ProblemDetail JSON on 4xx.
step.output: Green startup across profiles; clean ProblemDetail response.
